title: Plutarch, Moralia: Whether Affections of the Soul or of the Body are Worse
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Affections of the Soul or of the Body are Worse.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Affections of the Soul or of the Body are Worse.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Whether Affections of the Soul or of the Body are Worse': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
